visits.note: Patient P024 presents with new onset of hypertension and type 2 diabetes. Blood pressure is noted to be 140/90 mmHg. HbA1c is 7.2% and LDL is 130 mg/dL. The patient is started on metformin 500mg twice daily and lisinopril 10mg daily.

Follow-up visit 6 months after initial diagnosis. The patient's blood pressure has decreased to 130/80 mmHg, but HbA1c has increased to 8.1%. The patient reports worsening fatigue and polyuria. The patient is started on simvastatin 20mg daily for hyperlipidemia.

Follow-up visit 6 months after previous visit. The patient's HbA1c has decreased to 7.5%, but BP has increased to 150/95 mmHg. The patient reports worsening dyspnea on exertion and edema. The patient is started on furosemide 40mg daily for chronic kidney disease.

Follow-up visit 8 months after previous visit. The patient's HbA1c has increased to 8.5% and BP has increased to 160/100 mmHg. The patient reports worsening fatigue, polyuria, and edema. The patient is started on insulin glargine 10units daily for type 2 diabetes and enalapril 10mg daily for hypertension.
